response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment of the song 'Soirée' (ソワレ) by Hoshimachi Suisei, confirmed via on-screen text and performance. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'ソワレ 星街すいせい'. 3. Found the official song credits (Music: Riku Iwami, Lyrics: Nanahoshi Kangengakudan) and full lyrics. 4. Identified the remaining video segments as post-performance talk (scene 2) and a phone call scene (scene 3). 5. Compiled the structured JSON response, including the translated lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by the VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei, followed by a post-performance concluding segment, and ending with a dramatic phone call scene.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei performs her song 'Soirée' (ソワレ) on a live stage with a band. The atmosphere is intimate, with warm stage lighting and stage props like lamps and plants.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あの黄昏も 折り畳めば静寂
僕らの街じゃ 暗がりは合図だ
灯を消して はじめよう 幕よ開け
見上げ願いを あなたのように変わらず在っていたい
きらめきのヴェールを目元に
箒星 描いて瞬いた
ソワレ 今だ!
寝息を立てる太陽の目を盗んで
大脱走さ 逃げ出そうぜ
朝未き空を跨ぐ 栞を挟んだら
行かなくちゃ ソワレ
夜が明けるまでさ
もうすこし このままで
あの鐘の音は 茜差したって止まない時間だ
集まろう 野望に喝采 エールを
未来の話を 寂しそうに聞いてる君に誓うよ
世界に魔法がなくたって夢は続いていく
おやすみに代わるよう
鳴りやまないメロディー 届けて
見逃すな ソワレ
僕ら目撃者だ
蒼穹に手を伸ばした
水平線がうたた寝したって
とめどなく日々を繋ぐ 架け橋 渡ったら
いつの日か ソワレ
君に届くまでさ
何度でも 呼び声を
【Star tail】消えない軌跡 辿って
【Star tale】幾星霜の果てへ どこまでも
一晩じゃ語り尽くせない悲劇も
一晩中 語り明かせたら喜劇になってゆく
【Star tail】聞かせてよ【Star tail】
一筋の【Star tale】
瞬いた ソワレ 今だ!
寝息を立てる太陽の目を盗んで
大脱走さ 逃げ出そうぜ
朝未き空を跨ぐ 栞を挟んだら
約束だ ソワレ
僕が眠るまでは
何度でも また明日
拝啓、ソワレ君へ
詠み継がれる僕たちの物語
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even if you fold up that twilight, it's silence.
In our town, the darkness is a signal.
Turn off the lights, let's begin, let the curtains rise.
Look up and make a wish, wanting to be exactly as you were.
The veil of sparkle on your eyes,
Drawing a shooting star, it twinkled. Soirée!
Now! Stealing eyes from the sleeping sun,
It's a great escape, let's run away.
Across the morning sky, if you bookmark it,
You have to go. Soirée!
Until the dawn breaks, a little longer, stay like this.
That bell sound, even if it's sunset, is time that doesn't stop.
Let's gather, applause for ambition, yell for the future.
I swear to you, who listens so lonely.
Even if there's no magic in the world, dreams go on.
Like replacing 'goodnight', a melody that never stops.
Deliver it, don't miss it. Soirée!
We are witnesses.
Reaching out to the blue sky, even if the horizon dozed off,
Endlessly connecting the days, the bridge we crossed.
Someday, Soirée! Until it reaches you,
Again and again, the call [Star tail].
Tracing the unerasable trajectory [Star tale],
To the end of the ages, no matter where.
Even the tragedy that can't be told in one night,
If we can tell it all night, it becomes a comedy.
[Star tail] Let me hear it [Star tail],
A streak of [Star tale],
It twinkled. Soirée! Now!
Stealing eyes from the sleeping sun,
It's a great escape, let's run away.
Across the morning sky, if you bookmark it,
It's a promise. Soirée!
Until I sleep, again and again,
See you tomorrow.
Dear Soirée-kun,
our story that will be recited.

scenes.description: The performance concludes. The band members and Hoshimachi Suisei interact and thank the audience.
Hoshimachi Suisei appears off-stage, talking on her phone, possibly discussing upcoming announcements.
